name: Apple-Berry Salsa with Cinnamon Chips
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 475°F (245°C).
2. Brush tortillas with water using a pastry brush.
3. Combine sugar and cinnamon; sprinkle over tortillas. Place wedges on a baking sheet.
4. Cut each tortilla into eight wedges. Bake 5-7 minutes or until golden brown. Remove to a cooling rack.
5. Meanwhile, peel, core, and slice apples. Chop strawberries and kiwi. Zest orange using a lemon zester. Juice the orange with a juicer.
6. Combine prepared fruit, orange zest, orange juice, brown sugar, and apple jelly in a bowl.
7. Serve the fruit salsa with cinnamon chips.
